name: Lead Tracker — Weekly Digest → Slack
_purpose: Mondays 9am ET. Last 7 days: new handoffs, new orders, revenue, conversion %, payout owed (internal channel only).

parameters.text:
📈 *McKenzie weekly digest — week of {{$json.weekStart}}*
• New handoffs: *{{$json.newHandoffs}}*
• Orders: *{{$json.newOrders}}* ({{$json.conversionPct}}% conversion)
• Revenue generated: *{{$json.revenueFmt}}*

*Top campaigns this week:*
{{$json.topCampaigns}}

💰 *Internal weekly payout summary — week of {{$json.weekStart}}*\nProjected payout this week (15% × first-order revenue): *{{$json.payoutFmt}}*\nReminder: payout column still hidden in McKenzie's view per Ryan + Kody.
